Junior Data Scientist
DataBridge Analytics — Manchester, UK (Remote)

About DataBridge
DataBridge Analytics helps mid-market retailers turn raw sales data into actionable insights. Our platform ingests point-of-sale feeds and produces demand forecasts, inventory recommendations, and customer segmentation reports.

The Role
We are hiring a Junior Data Scientist to join our growing Analytics team. You will work alongside senior data scientists to build and validate predictive models, clean messy datasets, and present findings to non-technical stakeholders.

Responsibilities
- Explore and clean large datasets using Python and pandas
- Build and evaluate machine learning models with scikit-learn
- Create visualisations and dashboards in Jupyter notebooks
- Write SQL queries to extract and transform data from our warehouse
- Document methodology and results for internal knowledge base
- Participate in weekly model review sessions

Requirements
- Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field (Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or similar)
- 0-1 years of professional or internship experience in data science
- Proficiency in Python with pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn
- Comfortable writing SQL queries for data extraction
- Experience with Jupyter notebooks for exploratory analysis
- Basic understanding of statistical concepts (regression, classification, hypothesis testing)

Nice to Have
- Familiarity with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift)
- Experience with data visualisation tools (Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly)
- Knowledge of version control with Git
- Exposure to deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)

Salary: GBP 30,000 - 38,000
Remote Policy: Fully remote
